message:
feat(observability): add early warning severity system, conformal prediction, and task wait graph diagnostics

Spectral health monitor gains Scheffer-inspired early warning indicators
(critical slowing down via lag-1 autocorrelation, variance amplification,
oscillation/flicker detection) combined into a single EarlyWarningSeverity
classification. Adds conformal prediction lower bounds and e-process
anytime-valid deterioration evidence for statistically grounded alerting.
Bottleneck identification corrected to use near-zero Fiedler components
(near the min-cut transition) with <= threshold instead of < threshold.

Diagnostics module now builds a live task wait graph from runtime state,
feeds it into the spectral health monitor, and surfaces directional
deadlock detection with cycle extraction and severity classification.
New public types: DeadlockCycle, DeadlockSeverity, DirectionalDeadlockReport.

Prometheus and OTel metric consumers updated to use accessor methods
(scope_metrics(), metrics(), name(), description(), data()) instead of
direct field access, adapting to upstream API changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
